name: White Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the custard or creme anglaise, combine the half and half, sugar, and eggs in a medium, heavy-bottomed saucepan over low heat. Cook, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon until the mixture thickens slightly and coats the back of the spoon (150°F).
2. Remove from heat and stir in the white chocolate until melted. Stir in cream and vanilla. Chill.
3. Place in the ice cream machine and freeze according to manufacturer's instructions.
4. If using the extra white chocolate, add during the last 5 minutes of freezing, then continue processing until the ice cream is frozen.
